title: rosa eglanteria var. umbellata
intro: Rosa eglanteria var. umbellata, also known as the fragrant rose or fragrant dog rose, is a variety of rose that is native to Europe and Western Asia. This plant has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Rosa eglanteria var. umbellata include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate digestive issues. Herbal preparations of this plant include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to treat various health conditions, including colds, sore throats, and menstrual cramps.
